HOW WE’RE DIFFERENT: We aim to inspire you to live a more convenient and secure lifestyle. We are focusing on all the details that matter to you.
description: Product Description Meccion - A professional team dedicated to developing tools. We aim to make the best products to live a more convenient and secure lifestyle. We have a professional products monitoring team focusing on all the details. To give our customers to live a more comfortable and safer lifestyle. Combination Wrenches Meccion Open and ratchet combination spanners, easy to use for removing and fixing all kinds of screws and bolts. High Quality Material Ratchet combination wrenches are made of high quality chrome vanadium steel with black nickle plated finished, heat treated for strength and durability. Excellent Performance 72 teeth ratchet wrench only needs 5° ratchet swing action is great for confined space work. Lets you get your work done quickly and significantly more efficiently. Spanner Feature: Made of Hardened chrome vanadium steel forged. Black nickel plated for corrosion resistance. 5°ratchet action provides easy and quick access to tight spaces. The hex geometry provides a perfect fit and prevents slipping off tighten or loosen nuts. Ideal for automotive, mechanical engineering, general DIY and bicycle repairs. Product Specification: Material: Chrome Vanadium Steel. Finish: Polished with Black nickel plated. Spanner Size: 6mm-32mm. Cleverly designed to loosen and tighten hard-to-reach bolts. The 5° ratchet action allows easy access to small spaces, making this spanner a vital addition to any toolbox. It’s easy to control and operate and features an offset open end.
